# Dogfood demo vault diagnosis: fixture setup → validate → doctor.
# The fixture is synthetic and local-only; the test copies it before mutating mtimes.

prepare-demo-vault vault

exec sh -c 'pinax vault validate --vault vault --json > validate.json'
validate-json-envelope validate.json
validate-clean-stdout validate.json
grep '"command":"vault.validate"' validate.json
grep '"status":"success"' validate.json

exec sh -c 'pinax vault doctor --vault vault --json > doctor.json'
validate-json-envelope doctor.json
validate-clean-stdout doctor.json
grep '"command":"vault.doctor"' doctor.json
grep '"status":"partial"' doctor.json
assert-demo-doctor doctor.json

exec sh -c 'pinax vault doctor --vault vault --agent > doctor.agent'
validate-agent-format doctor.agent
validate-clean-stdout doctor.agent
grep 'command=vault.doctor' doctor.agent
grep 'issue.1.code=' doctor.agent
